title: Trailer Adventure
body:
**Trailer Adventure** is a modpack designed to look like minecraft trailers.

 ### What you can exactly expect:
Updated weather

 > Seasons system

 > Snowier snow

New structures and updated world generation

 > Towns And Towers

 > Tectonic(before 1.21)

 Many visual enhancements, bugfixes and quality of life features
 
 > Voice Chat
 
 > In game downloadable resource pack, shaders(before 1.21)

 > Controler Support

Good performance and support for shaders 

 > Iris with sodium
 
 > Noxesium, Exrodium and etc.

Project is separate from Ancient Team, but published under it
 

I also think it's worth playing it with friends, and if you don't have a server here's a code for **10% discount on chunkserve** 

**Code : K8bus**.
